title: Certificate program on Gen AI for legal professionals: Enrol now!
description: It is no longer a debate whether AI will impact legal practice — it already has. And the gap between those who master AI and those who don’t is widening every single day.According to the Wolters Kluwer Future Ready Lawyer Survey 2026, 62% of legal professionals are already saving 6–20% of their time every week using AI, with nearly 50% reporting similar gains in revenue.
